project.name: EpiowAI Renovate Config
project.summary: EpiowAI organization Renovate relay preset that extends the Sylphx org-wide dependency-update policy.
goals: Expose a stable Renovate preset entry point for EpiowAI repositories.
Extend SylphxAI/renovate-config as the base dependency-update policy.
Contain only EpiowAI-specific Renovate overrides in default.json.
nonGoals: Own the base Renovate policy shared across the wider Sylphx ecosystem.
Own application dependency decisions inside individual EpiowAI product repositories.
Own enterprise engineering doctrine, standards, or manifest schema.

owns.name: epiowai-renovate-relay-preset
owns.description: The EpiowAI organization Renovate preset relay and any EpiowAI-specific override rules in default.json.

doesNotOwn: Base dependency-update policy owned by SylphxAI/renovate-config.
Product-specific dependency exceptions owned by each product repository.
Enterprise doctrine and manifest schema owned by SylphxAI/doctrine.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema and engineering doctrine

forbiddenCouplings: Do not duplicate base Renovate policy that belongs in SylphxAI/renovate-config.
Do not encode product-specific dependency exceptions here.
Do not fork doctrine standards into this repository.

delivery.deployPath: not-applicable: Renovate resolves default.json from GitHub after merge to main.
delivery.productionProof: JSON validation, GitHub main readback, doctrine project-control audit, and downstream Renovate runs in consuming repositories.

gaps.description: No repository-local CI currently validates the Renovate preset against Renovate's schema or central doctrine conformance.
gaps.target: Adopt a Renovate preset validation gate after baseline manifest rollout.
